typography.font_strategy: The 'Swiss Brutalist' adapted for B2B Tech

mono.usage: Execution Logs, Code Snippets, Node IDs

spacing_and_layout.padding_scale: p-4, p-6, p-8 for cards; p-12, p-20 for sections
spacing_and_layout.builder_layout: Full bleed 100vh canvas. Floating Glassmorphism toolbars (z-50) overlapping the grid.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Strict left-alignment for all data and forms. Center only for hero text or empty states.

surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Flat background (bg-zinc-900), 1px subtle border (border-zinc-800), no drop shadow. Crisp, technical look.
surface_strategies.floating_nav_and_toolbars: Crystal Glassmorphism: bg-zinc-950/60, backdrop-blur-xl, border-b or border border-white/10.
surface_strategies.builder_nodes: Neumorphic/Technical mix: bg-zinc-900, 1px solid border-zinc-700, sharp corners (rounded-md), very subtle shadow-lg. Highlight active node with border-white and shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,255,255,0.1)].
surface_strategies.execution_logs: Terminal Look: bg-black, border border-zinc-800, text-zinc-300 font-mono text-xs.

components.buttons: Primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-zinc-200 rounded-md font-medium. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-zinc-800 text-zinc-300 hover:text-white hover:border-zinc-600.
components.inputs_and_forms: Shadcn defaults customized to dark theme. bg-zinc-950, border-zinc-800, focus:ring-1 focus:ring-white focus:border-white.
components.react_flow: Use dark theme for React Flow canvas. Background dots/lines in zinc-800. Edges in zinc-500, animated (stroke-dasharray) when active.
components.modals_and_dialogs: Glass overlay (bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm). Dialog box solid bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800.

auth_background.description: Dark premium abstract background 3D geometric glass floating shapes for the Login/Register page

builder_empty_state.description: Abstract high-end 3D render of a node-based visual programming interface for empty states or placeholder marketing hero

avatars.description: Business professional portrait for user profile placeholder

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements MUST change background or border color and text color on hover. Use transition-colors duration-200.
motion_and_interactions.focus_states: High contrast focus rings. focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-zinc-100 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-zinc-950.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Subtle fade-in for dashboard views (opacity 0 to 1).
motion_and_interactions.node_connections: React flow edges should have a subtle animated pulse (stroke-dasharray animation) to simulate data flowing when a workflow is active.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text against zinc-950 or zinc-900 background passes WCAG AA (minimum 4.5:1).
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: All buttons, inputs, canvas nodes, and links MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='add-node-button').
accessibility_and_testing.aria: Use aria-labels for icon-only buttons in the builder toolbar.

icons.style: Technical, consistent 1.5px stroke width. Use Phosphor Icons if heavier weights are needed, but stick to Lucide by default.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure Tailwind config is properly set up with custom zinc and white palette colors.
Add Cabinet Grotesk, IBM Plex Sans, and JetBrains Mono from the provided install URLs to index.css or the HTML head.
Use Shadcn/ui components extensively but override default 'Vercel' look to match the dark premium B2B style described in surface_strategies.
Implement the React Flow canvas as the core feature. Floating toolbars must use the Crystal Glassmorphism style (bg-zinc-950/60 backdrop-blur-xl).
Do not use generic blue/purple AI gradients. Stick to the stark, objective, monochromatic palette (zinc grays + stark white).
Integrate the auth_background image specifically on the right or left split-screen of the Login/Register page.
For the 'Mind Map/Funnel Board', use a simplified read-only mode of React Flow or a structured flex layout matching the visual builder's node styling.
Execution Logs should resemble a terminal: dark background, monospace font, green/red success/error subtle highlights.
Do not use ANY placeholder URLs (like placehold.it). Use the URLs provided in media_urls.
